name: assemblyExec
description: Prepare AssemblyExec execution mode or payload execution.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

action.description: Execution mode selector or payload type accepted by init(): thread, process, processWithSpoofedParent, -r, -e, or -d.

input_file.description: Raw shellcode, .NET executable, or .NET DLL path. Required for -r, -e, and -d. The module also searches the release Tools directory.

method.description: DLL method name. Required only when action is -d.

arguments.description: Optional arguments passed to the .NET executable or DLL method.
